i use a rly similar team
as of like yesterday so i dont have all the exp like nymph does
here is the one im using
so basically the idea behind it is
Helot and Aurita basically either one shot the enemy or cripple them so hard they just die
To do this I think u need Power of the Pious and if u dont have that u need to find a way to get Helot strengthened
basically Aurita removes all the shields and applies vuln to their highest hp target
then in mine Winkle applies vuln to two more targets and Casiah gives me either a full dispel or full cleanse // extra alimeus
and then Helot builds charges and then kills the enemy
In yours with Ramona you want to use uh
if you dont have Sorel's wheel or Power of the Pious then maybe Endure the Pain would work
The main challenge is getting to 100 alimeus on Aurita and Helot
but then once you do it's just
aurita vuln and ulting and then building charge on helot then her ulting and hoping everyone dies
The clapback is too hard if you dont fully kill people
The team has not really good damage outside cleave
Reason why I run pious+rose is that i can still win if one of them dies
Theres enough damage to go around
So I can win if one of them dies huh
i need simulation generally to win if one of them dies
